dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio — we don't play nice. We play music. Kasper Nyemann - Københavns Brunette out. Bring Det På "Ring Til Politiet" (Officiel Music Video) in. Let's go!
commercial_text: New from the makers of nothing — the SmartFridge X. It texts you when you're out of milk. It also texts your ex.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Bring Det På "Ring Til Politiet" (Officiel Music Video)
